testcase.name: test_build_context_prefix_returns_system_channel_block_no_user_glue

failure.message:
AssertionError: assert 'Context (do... translate):' not in 'Context (do...为电镀前本体打伤\n\n'
'Context (do not translate):' is contained here: Context (do not translate): 1、客户信和达（欧朗）2024.08.23反馈我司材料P6SMBJ18CA DC 2427M 20PCS本体破损，退回4pcs分析 2、不良品本体侧面破损，破损处有锡电镀层，判断为电镀前本体打伤

testcase.failure: tests/test_context_prefix_bleed.py:94: in test_build_context_prefix_returns_system_channel_block_no_user_glue assert "Context (do not translate):" not in result E AssertionError: assert 'Context (do... translate):' not in 'Context (do...为电镀前本体打伤\n\n' E E 'Context (do not translate):' is contained here: E Context (do not translate): E 1、客户信和达（欧朗）2024.08.23反馈我司材料P6SMBJ18CA DC 2427M 20PCS本体破损，退回4pcs分析 E 2、不良品本体侧面破损，破损处有锡电镀层，判断为电镀前本体打伤
